timeline.title: Iran war live: US and Iran exchange deadly attacks for 7th night - Al Jazeera
timeline.description:
1. Iran war live: US and Iran exchange deadly attacks for 7th night  Al Jazeera
  2. U.S. strikes bridges in Iran; Tehran targets U.S. bases in the Gulf  NPR
  3. Live updates: US launches another round of strikes after Iran widens its attacks on regional allies  CNN
  4. Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Expands Airstrikes With Attacks on Bridges and a Port in Southern Iran  The New York Times
  5. Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain  CNBC
  6. US and Iran escalate strikes across Mideast; bridges and a water plant hit  AP News
  7. Iran threatens to lash out at Arab neighbors as US ramps up strikes  Fox News
  8. Iran War Updates: U.S. launches 7th straight day of strikes as traffic freezes up in Strait of Hormuz  CBS News
  9. U.S. strikes bridges around key port in Iran, expanding campaign in battle over Hormuz  NBC News
